title: xylopicrum carminativum
intro: Xylopicrum carminativum, also known as the Yellow Cardwood or Yellow Card, is a tropical tree native to the Caribbean and Central America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its carminative and anti-inflammatory effects, which help to relieve digestive discomfort and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Xylopicrum carminativum include its ability to alleviate nausea, diarrhea, and flatulence, as well as its potential to support respiratory health and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of Xylopicrum carminativum include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of various ailments.
